expectations.text: Recommends Event-Driven or Space-Based as the top candidate
expectations.evidence: Recommends Event-Driven Architecture. Correctly identifies it as natural fit for IoT streaming.

expectations.text: Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles
expectations.evidence: No ranked table. Only discusses 3 alternatives (Microservices, Space-Based) in prose. Does not score all 8 styles.

expectations.text: Includes tradeoff analysis for at least 2 top candidates
expectations.evidence: Discusses Microservices and Space-Based as alternatives with reasons for rejection.
No cost analysis. Does not mention $ ratings or compare infrastructure costs.

expectations.text: Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section
expectations.evidence: architecture.md has Selected Architecture Style section with style and rationale.

expectations.text: Does NOT recommend Layered, Modular Monolith, or Microkernel
expectations.evidence: Recommends Event-Driven. Simple architectures not mentioned.
